esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-sqlserverreceiver.otel-default
// TempDB space by state (free/used); filter for free space
| WHERE metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space IS NOT NULL
| WHERE COALESCE(attributes.tempdb.state, tempdb.state) == "free"
| STATS min_free_kb = MIN(metrics.sqlserver.database.tempdb.space),
       instance_id = MAX(resource.attributes.service.instance.id)
  BY COALESCE(resource.attributes.service.instance.id, host.name, "unknown")
// Alert when free space below 100MB (102400 KB); adjust for your TempDB size
| WHERE min_free_kb < 102400
| KEEP instance_id, min_free_kb
